steps.title: Identify what information is relevant to explaining the principle
steps.content:
The notes define the principle: “an object's shape should be determined primarily by its intended purpose.” This definition is the most relevant information for explaining the principle.

Information about Klara Hoffmann's background or the school's general influence would be less relevant to the task.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A (‘According to the Bauhaus, an object's intended purpose (function) should primarily determine its shape (form).’) includes the definition—it directly explains that function determines form.

The other choices mention the principle but either name it without defining it, embed it in biographical details, or describe it without explaining the causal mechanism.

That confirms A is correct.
